recommendations.recommendation: Use a single H1 tag per page with the primary keyword. Use H2/H3 tags to create a clear content hierarchy.
recommendations.details: 1/10 competitors use a single H1 tag.
recommendations.example: H1: 'Japanese & English TCG Cards | Akihabara TCG Warehouse', H2: 'Shop by Game', H3: 'Pokemon TCG'

recommendations.recommendation: Target these high-frequency competitor keywords in titles, headings, and content.
recommendations.details: Top keywords found across competitors: https, pokemon, one piece, lorcana, preorder, tcg, pokémon, yu-gi-oh, deck, mtg
recommendations.example: Include 'trading card game', 'pokemon cards', 'booster box' in key page content

recommendations.recommendation: Add descriptive alt text to all product images. Include game name, product type, and language.
recommendations.example: alt='Pokemon TCG Scarlet Violet Booster Box Japanese Sealed' not alt='image1.jpg'

recommendations.recommendation: Add canonical link tags to all pages to prevent duplicate content issues.
Build strong internal linking with descriptive anchor text. Link between categories, products, and related items.
recommendations.details: 8/10 competitors have strong internal linking (20+ links).
recommendations.example: Link 'Pokemon Booster Boxes' to category page, cross-link 'You may also like' products

recommendations.recommendation: Add category description text below product listings. Include trust signals, brand partnerships, and shipping info.
recommendations.details: Competitors use category descriptions, trust badges, and shipping info to build credibility.
recommendations.example: Add 'About Our Pokemon Cards' section with authenticity guarantee and Japan-sourced details

recommendations.recommendation: Use clean, keyword-rich URL structure: /category/subcategory/product-name format.
recommendations.details: Top competitors use hierarchical URL structures (e.g., /pokemon/booster-boxes, /yugioh/structure-decks).

recommendations.recommendation: Leverage 'Akihabara' and 'Japan-sourced' as unique differentiators. Target Japanese TCG-specific keywords that competitors miss.
recommendations.details: Few competitors emphasize Japanese origin/sourcing. This is a unique SEO opportunity.
recommendations.example: Target: 'japanese pokemon cards', 'akihabara card shop', 'authentic japanese booster box', 'japan imported tcg'
